36721853.fa: Dr. Castner is the Editor-in-Chief of the Journal of Emergency Nursing and President and Principal of Castner Incorporated, scientific dissemination, and organizational change and development. Dr. Castner's primary research interest focus is environmental determinants of health and emergency outcomes and care
36721853.la: Dr. Foli's work is bound together by the lens of psychological trauma. With this theme, she builds theory and conducts investigations surrounding parental postadoption depression; relationships between trauma and substance use in nurses; and nurses' trauma and cognitive control. As a nurse theorist, Dr. Foli conceptualized and disseminated two theories: a Middle Range Theory of Parental Postadoption Depression and a Middle Range Theory of Nurses' Psychological Trauma.
